snippet.title: POLKAHOLIKI - LJUBLJENA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
SI: POLKAHOLIKI so za vsa dekleta in žene posneli romantično pesem, odo ženskam in dekletom. Lepo je ljubiti in vsako jutro pogledat v LJUBLJENE oči, ki žarijo od sreče. Polkaholiki verjamejo, da lahko dekle. ki jo ljubiš večno, spoznaš tudi v zelo mladih letih. 

HR: POLKAHOLIKI su snimili najromantičniju pjesmu do sada koja je oda svim ženama. Pjesma se zove VOLJENA. Lijepo je voljeti i svako jutro gledati u voljene oči koje sijaju od sreće. Polkaholiki vjeruju da curu koju ćeš voljeti zauvijek, možeš upoznati dok si mlad.

Music: Raay Lyrics: Maja Kvertkov
Produced by: RAAY MUSIC, 2021
Video by: NEO VISUALS, 2021 
Executive producer: Raay 

ZAHVALE: Iskrena hvala za sodelovanje krajinskemu parku Sečoveljske soline za prekrasno lokacijo./ Iskreno hvala za sudjelovanje PARKU PRIRODE SEČOVLJANSKE SOLANE za predivnu lokaciju. 

HVALA:  Poročni salon HOLLYWOOD - Franjo Oset & Kontrabas Forte - Mesarija FinGušt

Matic, Žiga, Rene in Gašper! Vaši POLKAHOLIKI! 

FOLLOW POLKAHOLIKI INSTAGRAM: @polkaholiki
E-mail: polkaholiki@gmail.com 
GSM kontakt / management: +386 31 568 405 
FB: https://www.facebook.com/polkaholiki/

Pretplati se na JoomBoos, stisni zvonce i ne propusti niti jedan video: http://bit.ly/joomboos_subscribe

✔Znaš li da imamo i TikTok? Zaprati nas: https://vm.tiktok.com/Xs7PCb/
Čekiraj naš web i zabavi se uz mnoštvo kvizova, savjeta i novosti iz YouTube svijeta: https://joomboos.hr/

 I ovdje smo: INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/joomboosyt/

Premijera spota i pjesme "INAMORANA" - Tonči Huljić & Madre Badessa feat. Petar Grašo.

Aranžman: Tonči Huljić, Eduard Botrić, Dušan Vasić

Download:
Apple Music - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-AppleMusic
Amazon - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Amazon

Listen:
Spotify - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Spotify
Deezer - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Deezer
Tidal - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Tidal

Video: PILOT studio
Kamera: Bruno Bilonić
Montaža: Notengos
Šminka: Ana Favro
Glumice: Jasna Malec Utrobičić, Petra Kapor

Zahvaljujemo: Hotel Slavija, Duje Bonačić

© Tonci Huljic & Madre Badessa - Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimke i postavljanje na druge kanale!

#TonciHuljic #Inamorana #PetarGraso #MadreBadessa

Inamorana,
uvik je dobro vrime
nekom svome doć...
Inamorana,
ja srce svoje po tvon
štiman dan i noć...
Inamorana,
profumi mažurana
prolaze kraj nas...
Inamorana,
kad judi vole
šutnja najjači je glas...

Di bi ti, di bi ti,
tu bi ja...
Di si ti, di si ti,
tu san ja...
Da  proveden tri života
sa tobon u četri oka,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Da ti stoput kažen fala
za sve ono šta si dala,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...

inamorana – zaljubljena
profumi - mirisi

snippet.title: The Truth About my Son
snippet.description:
Now that you've met my son, please consider sharing and donating to impact his life and so many others like him.

snippet.title: Polo G - RAPSTAR (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official video for "RAPSTAR" by Polo G

Listen + Download "RAPSTAR" out now: https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR

Amazon Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/amazonmusic
Apple Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/applemusic
Audiomack - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/audiomack

Soundcloud - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/soundcloud
Spotify - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/spotify
YouTube Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/youtubemusic

Lyrics

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

I won’t love a hoe after we fuck she can’t get near me
Only bitch I give a conversation to is Siri
My pants Amiri
Yes I’m winning clearly
I’m the chosen one see my potential so they fear me
Lately I’ve been praying God I wonder can you hear me
Thinking about the old me I swear I miss you dearly
Stay down until you come up I’ve been sticking to that theory
Every day a battle I’m exhausted and I’m weary
Make sure I smile in public when alone my eyes teary
I fought through it all but that shit hurt me severely 
I’ve been getting high to hide behind my insecurities
Taking different pills but I know it ain’t no 

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

They say I’m Pac rebirth
Never put out a weak verse
Homicides when we lurk
Imma step ‘til my feet hurt
Been putting them streets first
White tee turned burgundy tee shirts
Looking for something real, he stuck in a deep search
Anxiety killing me I just wanna leave Earth
When they ask if I’m okay it just make everything seem worse
Trying to explain your feelings sound like something you rehearse 
Stab me in my back with a clean smirk

Looking so deep into your eyes I can read your thoughts
Shut the fuck- I mean please don’t talk
I’ve done been through too much and I don’t need another loss
Put that on every war scar for every battle that I’ve fought

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished
When I’m finished, when I’m finished

Directed by Arrad
Written & Co-directed by Polo G
Produced by Riveting Entertainment

snippet.title: BAKAPRASE - OBI (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/bakaprase/​
ŠAIM SE. brend USKORO: https://saimse.com/​
SPOTIFY: uskoro...
DEEZER: uskoro...

Tekst: @BakaPrase 
Muzika: BakaPrase
Aranžman: @jonezr9 @bogi_batina
mix/master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug
Video Edit & Post Production: Debbug - @nedeljkovicvuk

Hvala horu "Čarolija" što su otpevali najllepše na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


ref x 2
bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan

snippet.title: The Funeral of HRH The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh 🔴 Live - BBC
snippet.description:
Huw Edwards introduces live coverage of the ceremonial Funeral of HRH The Duke of Edinburgh from Windsor. Her Majesty The Queen, together with other members of the Royal Family will attend the funeral service. A full military procession and members of the Royal Family will accompany the coffin, as it makes the final journey from Windsor Castle to St George's Chapel.

Throughout the afternoon, Huw Edwards will be joined by special guests, including Sir David Attenborough, Baroness Scotland, Alan Titchmarsh, and Baroness Grey-Thompson, to remember the man behind the crown. Royal experts will share their thoughts and analysis on this historic occasion and pay tribute to The Duke of Edinburgh’s life of service and duty.

JJ Chalmers and Sophie Raworth in Windsor will report on the events from key locations around the Castle and will meet people participating in today’s ceremonial events.

The Funeral of HRH The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh - BBC

snippet.title: NIKA ZORJAN - ZATE DOVOLJ (Official Video)
snippet.description:
HR:
Nika Zorjan donosi van novu pjesmu ZATE DOVOLJ (Za tebe dovoljna). Priča puna emocija i poruke o bezuvjettnoj ljubavi, neće vas ostaviti hladninma. Pravu filmsku glazbenu priču odglumili su ROBERT KOROŠEC, glavni glumac trenutno #1 hit serije Najini mostovi na slovenskoj POP TV i mlada LANAI. U  životu najviše znači kada si nekome dovoljan zbog toga što si i kakav jesi.

SI:
NIKA ZORJAN nam predstavlja novo pesem ZATE DOVOLJ. Biti ljubljen zato ker si in tak kot si je najlepši občutek na svetu. Z ganljivim videospotom, polnim emocij, sta filmsko glasbeno zgodbo  odigrala ROBERT KOROŠEC, glavni igralec serije Najini mostovi na Pop Tv in mlada LANAI, ki bosta pričarala čarovnijo, ki jo opisuje skladba.

TEKST / LYRICS:

DOBRA DRUŽBA,

IN STOPIŠ ME KAKOR LED

IN TI, TI ME NASMEJEŠ, ME OGREJEŠ,

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her household’s most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular – a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing “appropriate” engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the Queen’s deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her household’s most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular – a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing “appropriate” engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the Queen’s deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Skip & Shannon react to Luka Doncic's 'lucky' game-winning shot against Grizzlies | NBA | UNDISPUTED
snippet.description:
Even during an eventful night of impressive NBA performances, Luka Doncic still stole the show. With one point eight seconds left and the Dallas Mavericks down two to the Memphis Grizzlies, Luka received the inbounds pass before splitting a double team, stumbling and somehow getting the shot off and draining it. After the game, Luka was pretty honest saying he was surprised when it went in considering he didn’t see the rim when he released it, and he called it quote, 'kinda lucky.' Hear what Skip Bayless and Shannon Sharpe have to say about Luka's lucky shot.

#Undisputed #NBA #LukaDoncic #DallasMavericks #MemphisGrizzlies

localized.title: Skip & Shannon react to Luka Doncic's 'lucky' game-winning shot against Grizzlies | NBA | UNDISPUTED
localized.description:
Even during an eventful night of impressive NBA performances, Luka Doncic still stole the show. With one point eight seconds left and the Dallas Mavericks down two to the Memphis Grizzlies, Luka received the inbounds pass before splitting a double team, stumbling and somehow getting the shot off and draining it. After the game, Luka was pretty honest saying he was surprised when it went in considering he didn’t see the rim when he released it, and he called it quote, 'kinda lucky.' Hear what Skip Bayless and Shannon Sharpe have to say about Luka's lucky shot.

#Undisputed #NBA #LukaDoncic #DallasMavericks #MemphisGrizzlies

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: Luka Doncic sinks a WILD shot and Tim Legler talks NBA teams managing players' workload | Get Up
snippet.description:
Luka Doncic sinks a WILD shot and Tim Legler talks NBA teams managing players' workload | Get Up
Tim Legler joins Mike Greenberg on Get Up to discuss NBA teams managing players' minutes and workload this season following mounting concerns about star players sitting out during the regular season. 
0:00 Greeny breaks down highlights from Dallas Mavericks star Luka Doncic’s amazing game-winning buzzer-beater against the Memphis Grizzlies. 
1:20 Tim Legler on NBA teams managing players' workload during the season. 
3:45 Greeny previews the upcoming NBA action on ESPN.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy​
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E​
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales

localized.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
localized.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy​
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E​

snippet.title: Luka Doncic drains a 3-pointer buzzer-beater vs. Grizzlies and Joel Embiid drops 39 against the Nets
snippet.description:
Luka Doncic drains a 3-pointer buzzer-beater vs. Grizzlies and Joel Embiid drops 39 against the Nets
0:00 SportsNation kicks off the NBA action with Luka Doncic’s amazing game-winning buzzer-beater and how the NBA world reacted to it. 
1:45 The Philadelphia 76ers beat an under-manned Brooklyn Nets team with Joel Embiid putting up another MVP-level performance. 
3:30 Around the Association: The Milwaukee Bucks won big against the Minnesota Timberwolves, Reggie Jackson hit the game-winner for the LA Clippers, and Steph Curry tries to check back into a game after scoring 42 points. 
6:00 Ros Gold0-Onwude joins SportsNation to talk about the NBA’s tight schedule and how that is impacting the health of the league’s star players.
#NBA #SportsNation

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: 'Non-paper' o podjeli BiH: Reakcije članova Predsjedništva
snippet.description:
Sva tri člana Predsjedništva Bosne i Hercegovine reagovala su na tekst slovenskog portala "Necenzurisano" koji je objavio "non-paper" koji je navodno Vlada Slovenije uputila u Brisel, a koji predviđa podjelu Bosne i Hercegovine.

Željko Komšić, koji je ranije potvrdio da je aktuelni predsednik Slovenije Borut Pahor pitao da li je moguć miran razlaz u Bosni i Hercegovini, poručio je da su ideje koje su predstavljene u tom dokumentu nuđene i prije rata, pa se na njih nije pristalo.

Šefik Džaferović kaže da ne zna odakle dokument dolazi, ali da njegovo prisustvo u medijima predstavlja dovoljan znak za uzbunu. Dodaje i da se ovo može tumačiti kao vid pritiska i lobiranja u pogledu izmjene izbornog zakona i ograničenih ustavnih promjena.

Predsjedavajući Predsjedništva BiH Milorad Dodik u Beogradu je poručio da pitanje mirnog razlaza ili rata ne zavisi od domaćih aktera, već isključivo od SAD-a. Dodaje i da će Srbija sve više morati da bude involvirana u unutrašnja pitanja BiH.

#BiH

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Ep 2 (Berms, rollers, and singletrack!)
snippet.description:
Thumb bucket is Berm Peak's first machine cut mountain bike trail, which when finished will be a blank canvas for crazy features. This series documents us building the trail from bottom to top, from learning how to use a machine, to drainage, to technical difficulties.

Check out Squatch's YouTube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFpcbXL6wsGrQhUDQgvOGCQ

Check out Joe's YouTube Channel 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCccgqHpyg6ax6dLzBx9yZGA

Berm Peak Hoodies, Beanies, Jerseys, Shirts
https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

Support Berm Park! The free public bike park that YOU can ride! Join my Patreon and 100% of the proceeds go towards funding this. Construction is underway right now! 
Learn more here https://www.patreon.com/sethsbikehacks
Video explaining Berm Parkhttps://youtu.be/lZLE6zB-uuI

Advertising disclosure: All of these videos contain products, logos, or mentions associated with Diamondback Bicycles. Whether or not the video itself was sponsored by Diamondback, they do support this channel, and by extension, every video on it.

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - we’ve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, we’re here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As you’d expect, Mat’s in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, we’ve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although it’s also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider it’s powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, it’s surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, there’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

.............................................................

Tiktok - https://www.tiktok.com/@carwow

Facebook – http://www.facebook.com/carwowuk

Compare the five best offers by price, location and dealer ratings and choose the one that’s right for you – no hassle, no haggling, just a great deal.

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Disney STEAL Finding Nemo?
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH   

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ► https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH  

#FindingNemo #Pixar #Disney #Disney+ #DisneyTheory #PixarTheory #Theory #FilmTheory #Matpat

snippet.title: Robinzonove jabuke dočekaju i proljeće
snippet.description:
Vlašički Robinzon ima toliko zanimanja i sposobnosti da može konkurirati i za Guinnesovu knjigu rekorda. Međutim voćarstvo  mu je jedan od najdražih poslova. Do sada je kaže nakalamio tisuće divljih jabuka, krušaka, trešnji po šumama a jabuke tako dobro sačuva u kamenom podrumu da smo ih kušali prije par dana. Toliko su sočne i kvalitetne da je to prava rijetkost. Ramizova  šesteročlana porodica mjesečno pojede po stotinu kilograma domaćih jabuka. Obično su to autohtone bosanske sorte koje se ne tretiraju nikakvim kemikalijama. Posjetili smo i Robinzonove ribnjake. Evo što smo zabilježili.
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Рите оф Пассаге у навијачица | Нова навијачица у Дианином тиму! | Диана Схов
snippet.description:
Нова навијачица у Дианином тиму! Али ући у Дианин тим није тако лако. Диана и навијачице су смислили Рите оф Пассаге да свако ко жели да се придружи тиму мора проћи. Који је ово обред? А шта је Наста спремни за како би се у тим? Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mwZnYpBn5hk
Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Не заборавите на звоно!🔔🔔🔔
Хвала на вашим свиђањима!❤️❤️❤️

hr.title: Obred prolaska u navijačici | Nova navijačica u Dianinom timu! | Diana Show
hr.description:
Nova navijačica u Dianinom timu! No, pridružiti se Dianinu timu nije tako lako. Diana i obožavatelji smislili su Rite of Passage koji mora proći svatko tko se želi pridružiti timu. Koji je to obred? A na što je Nasta spremna da bi bila u timu? Pogledajte ovu seriju!
Pretplatite se na kanal! 👩‍👩‍👦‍👦
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Ne zaboravite na zvono! 🔔🔔🔔
Hvala na vašim lajkovima! ❤️❤️❤️

snippet.title: ARMAGEDON FINALE | Full event
snippet.description:
Nakon dvije odgode, treća je sreća najvjerojatnije pomazila finale prve sezone FNC Armagedona. Šest boraca u tri kategorije lovi laskavu titulu i ugovor s KSW-om. Očekuju vas i četiri supermeča!

RASPORED BORBI:
49:34 Vlasto Čepo vs Leon Krajačić
01:03:54 Adriana Vuković vs Ana Maria Pal
01:21:43 Donald Ćosić vs Tadej Dajčman
01:31:36 Karlo Caput vs Harry Hardwick
02:06:00 Nino Škrijelj vs Daniel Bažant
02:29:43 Patrik Čelić vs Marko Bojković
02:52:49 Jakob Kosić vs Marko Ostanek 

Pretplatite se na naš kanal, stisnite zvono i ne propustite niti jedan video: http://bit.ly/24sata_subscribe​​​ 
Pretplatite se i na JoomBoos kanal: http://bit.ly/joomboos_subscribe​​​

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 38. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Eda ve Serkan havaalanında karşılaşırlar ama hiç umulmadık bir şekilde... Serkan’ın rahatsızlığı Eda’yı derinden etkilemiştir ve zor bir karar vermek zorundadır. Diğer taraftan Selin vazgeçmemeye kararlıdır. Yaşadığı rahatsızlık ve sonrasında gelişen olaylar Serkan’ı hayatıyla ilgili radikal kararlar almaya iter. Serkan’ın yeni kararları herkesi şaşkına çevirmiştir. Eda ve Serkan aşklarına yeni bir başlangıç yapmak için aradıkları fırsatı bulabilecekler mi?

Sen Çal Kapımı Ailesine Katılmak için: https://bit.ly/3jB1Rsj﻿
Sen Çal Kapımı Resmi Youtube Kanalı: https://bit.ly/3dxNPVW

Kerem Bürsin ve Hande Erçel’in yanı sıra Neslihan Yeldan, İlayda Çevik, Evrim Doğan, Anıl İlter, Melisa Döngel, Çağrı Çıtanak, Elçin Afacan, Sitare Akbaş, Başak Gümülcinelioğlu, Alican Aytekin, Sarp Bozkurt, İlkyaz Arslan gibi birbirinden başarılı isimleri barındıyor.


#meleklerinsözüvar #KeremBürsin #HandeErçel

snippet.title: CHICKEN GIRLS | Season 8 | Ep. 4: “Wacky Wednesday”
snippet.description:
When Bel is embarrassed by Power Surge, she finds an unlikely ally in Leo. Meanwhile, Harmony and Jordan’s relationship is tested when Harmony joins the drama club.

ABOUT CHICKEN GIRLS
With Rhyme and her friends all grown up, Harmony has found her own squad of Chicken Girls. But with all their new interests, secrets and crushes, can this girl group survive middle school? Created by Janey Feingold.

ABOUT BRAT TV

snippet.title: Jasmina qan me ngashërim në studio, a ka rënë në dashuri me Andin? - Përputhen, 16 Prill 2021
snippet.description:
Për'Puthen është një talk show dashurie, i cili sjell histori të vërteta dhe të gjalla të njohjeve mes të rinjve . Ashtu sikundër ato ndodhin në jetën reale, pa filtra. Aty paraqitet zhvillimi i njohjeve të reja mes protagonistëve, por trajtohen edhe fenomene që ndodhin çdo ditë në shoqërinë tonë, përtej shkëlqimit të televizionit.

snippet.title: Most Important Crypto Video 2021 (Too Late to Invest In Crypto?)
snippet.description:
Is it too late to invest in crypto? I can give you the top coins for April or the next 1000x low cap gems. But the problem is, if you don’t understand what you are looking at or the opportunity that is before you, then you will botch it up. If you are newer to the cryptocurrency market, it may be easy for you to get turned off because things seem to be too complicated or over your head. 

With the recent pump in crypto and the surge in institutional investing, many people are wondering if it’s too late to invest in crypto. Today I’m going to explain to you whether or not it’s too late to buy crypto and if there’s still time for you to make money in cryptocurrency in 2021.

As we approach 1 million subscribers on YouTube, we will be giving away 1 full Bitcoin, 5 Ethereum, & 4,000 Cardano to 10 lucky winners.

snippet.title: Emanet 160. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 160 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#shorts

snippet.title: GIGANTIC Bitcoin Pump Incoming (BNB, XRP, ETH Lead Altcoin Super Cycle)
snippet.description:
Today we will talk about some gigantic altcoin moves this week from XRP, BNB, & ETH. Is Ethereum poised to finally go above $2500? We’ll discuss the possibility of China using Bitcoin as a weapon and the latest cryptocurrency news. The upcoming Coinbase IPO will most likely have a HUGE effect on the market, but are we seeing this effect already?

This month we have some really big news coming for ETH. Find out what this Ethereum news is and why institutional demand is on the rise. As Binance Coin establishes itself as the #3 coin, can it ever catch up to ETH? Can it even hold the #3 spot as XRP comes in hot?

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

I'm at https://tomscott.com
on Twitter at https://twitter.com/tomscott
on Facebook at https://facebook.com/tomscott
and on Instagram as tomscottgo

snippet.title: Antonela – Atdhe takimi i munguar, që provokon gjatë të gjithë kohës - Përputhen, 14 Prill 2021
snippet.description:
Për'Puthen është një talk show dashurie, i cili sjell histori të vërteta dhe të gjalla të njohjeve mes të rinjve . Ashtu sikundër ato ndodhin në jetën reale, pa filtra. Aty paraqitet zhvillimi i njohjeve të reja mes protagonistëve, por trajtohen edhe fenomene që ndodhin çdo ditë në shoqërinë tonë, përtej shkëlqimit të televizionit.

snippet.title: Luka Doncic Is FRUSTRATED! This Is Why
snippet.description:
The NBA is buzzing right now over this unbelievable one handed floater from downtown for the win at the buzzer.
However even with this miraculous win, the Mavs are still in the play in zone. And the format itself is actually completely changed for this year.
And Luka Doncic is not happy about it at all. Let me explain. What up everybody my name is Stefan and this is Heat Check. Let’s get into it.
Going over the tournament changes first, last year the 8 and 9 seed which were the Blazers and the Grizzlies were within 4 games of each other so they faced off before the playoffs.
Portland as the better seeded team had the advantage of needing just 1 win, while Memphis needed 2 in a row. Dame and CJ sealed the deal in the first game and got in the playoffs.
This season tho, the teams that are 7 through 10 will have a play in regardless of if they’re more or less than 4 games in the standings.
Also, contrary to popular belief, the games will not be played like this. 7 vs 10 and 8 vs 9. 
Not at all. The NBA made this super complicated so let me give you a practical example as if the play-in started today.
Actually the format is such that 7 plays 8 and 9 plays 10 in a single elimination game. 
The winner of the higher seeded matchup will go straight to the playoffs as number 7.
The loser however will get a second chance as an award for their better record than the bottom 2 squads.
And speaking of them 9 and 10 will battle and the team that fails in this game is eliminated and goes home, while the winner plays another deciding game against the team that lost in that higher seeded matchup. And then finally the better team gets the last place in the playoffs.
I promise you’re not getting a better explanation anywhere online, so if you’re still confused, blame the NBA and just re-watch this video. Ok let’s now get to Luka.
Recently in a postgame interview Doncic voiced his frustration and disagreement with how the format is set up.
Mark Cuban was quick to support his star player and this point of view with his own remarks calling the tournament an enormous mistake and saying that it doubles the stress that players and teams are already feeling because of the compressed schedule.
Now look, on 1 side it’s great for both us the fans, that we get to see some extra drama even before the playoffs. That Portland vs Memphis game last year was crazy. 
Also, it gives bottom teams something to play for instead of resorting to tanking in the second half of the season. Look at this. In the east the 13 place Cleveland are just 2 games out of it right now. They have a lot to fight for.
But on the other hand, I do understand Luka and you can’t give a 10 seed that big of a chance to where they could suck for the entire season, but then win 2 in a row and go straight to the playoffs. 
Anyway, it’s clear that these are just measurements that are implemented to combat the shortened schedule and everything else that happened in this unprecedented situation.
I’m sure that when all this settles and we have a full and normal season, the league would be able to find a sustainable solution that’s gonna be fair for all teams that are in playoff contention.
Until then, you’ll have to live with my explanation of the format. That’s it for now, subscribe and talk to you in the next one. Peace out.

snippet.title: Emanet 157. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 157 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I’ve had a lot of lives – like my cat, I’m on my ninth life.” 
Demi Lovato’s explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

id.title: Kelahiran Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku mempunyai banyak nyawa – seperti kucingku, aku dalam nyawa kesembilanku sekarang.”
Serial dokumenter eksplosif dari Demi Lovato hamper sampai kepada titik akhir dengan pengungkapan tentang pertunangannya yang kandas, kembalinya ke studio, dan eksplorasi dari kewarasan moderasi ketika dia mencoba untuk melepaskan masa lalunya dan melangkah maju menjalani hidup dengan penuh keceriaan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan) www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Cinta Adalah Respek. Cinta itu lebih besar dari sekadar caramu merasakan. Ketik loveis kirim ke 22522 untuk dukungan dan bantuan memahami hubungan yang sehat.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Ketik: loveis kirim ke 22522
Obrolan Daring: www.loveisrespect.org

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

Temukan sumber-sumber sebagai jalanmu untuk pemulihan di Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

de.title: Wiedergeburt : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich hatte viele Leben, wie meine Katze. Das ist mein neuntes."
Demi Lovatos explosive Dokuserie endet mit Enthüllungen über ihre gelöste Verlobung, ihre Rückkehr ins Studio und das Konzept des maßvollen Konsums, während sie versucht, ihre Vergangenheit ruhen zu lassen und ihre Wahrheit zu leben.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle der National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (auch Click-to-Chat-Nachrichten)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Liebe ist Respekt. Liebe ist mehr als das Gefühl. SMS mit loveis an 22522 zur Unterstützung von gesunden Beziehungen.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS: loveis to 22522
Online-Chat: www.loveisrespect.org

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

Finden Sie Hilfsangebote für Ihren Weg in die Genesung bei Recovery Resource Hub
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

fr.title: Renaissance : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"J'ai plusieurs vies, comme un chat. J'en suis à ma neuvième."

Le documentaire explosif de Demi Lovato touche à sa fin avec des révélations sur ses fiançailles rompues, son retour en studio et l'expérimentation d'une thérapie de la modération tandis qu'elle tente de tourner la page sur son passé et de vivre sa vérité. 

Ressources :
 
Plateforme d'écoute de la National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (chat en ligne disponible) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
L'amour est du respect. L'amour va plus loin que les sentiments. Envoyez "loveis" au 22522 pour soutenir et comprendre ce qu'est une relation saine.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
SMS : loveis au 22522
Chat en ligne : www.loveisrespect.org
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.
 
Pour vous aider dans votre processus de guérison, rendez-vous sur Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

pt-BR.title: renascimento : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Eu já tive várias vidas – como meu gato, estou na minha última.”
A explosiva série documental de Demi Lovato termina com revelações sobre o noivado rompido, sua volta ao estúdio e sua exploração da sobriedade moderada enquanto ela tenta se livrar do passado e encontrar sua verdade.

Recursos:

Telefone de atendimento da National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (também existe a chance de bate-papo online) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Amor é muito mais do que um sentimento. Envie loveis para 22522 para ter apoio e aprender a compreender relacionamentos saudáveis.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Envie: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

Encontre recursos para seu caminho para a recuperação em Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

ko.title: 환생 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"저는 제 고양이처럼 목숨이 아홉 개예요. 아홉 번째 인생을 살고 있죠"
데미 로바토의 파혼, 녹음실 복귀 이야기와 음주와 약물의 적정량 사용을 통해 과거를 놓고 진실한 삶을 살려는 시도를 공개하며 폭발적인 다큐멘터리 시리즈는 막을 내린다.

도움받을 곳:

전국 섭식 장애 협회 (NEDA) 헬프라인
1-800-931-2237 (채팅/메시징 서비스 제공)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

사랑은 존중입니다. 사랑은 감정 그 이상입니다. 22522로 loveis를 보내시면 도움과 함께 건강한 관계에 관해 배울 수 있습니다.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
문자: 22522로 loveis를 보내세요
온라인 상담: www.loveisrespect.org

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

Recovery Resource Hub에서 회복 과정을 위한 자원을 확인하세요.
(https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/)

es-419.title: renacimiento : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"He tenido muchas vidas. Como mi gato, estoy en mi última vida".
La explosiva serie documental de Demi Lovato llega a su fin con revelaciones sobre su compromiso cancelado, su regreso al estudio y la exploración de la sobriedad moderada mientras intenta dejar atrás su pasado y avanzar viviendo su verdad.

Recursos:

Línea de ayuda de la Asociación Nacional de Trastornos Alimentarios (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (también ofrecen chat en línea)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

El amor es respeto. El amor es algo más que lo que se siente. Envía loveis al 22522 para obtener apoyo y ayuda para entender las relaciones saludables.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Texto: loveis al 22522
Chat en línea: www.loveisrespect.org

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

Encuentra recursos para tu camino hacia la recuperación en el Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words

that's never heard

Don't circle the track

and leave your skin on the floor.

Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG​
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo​
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR​
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

MoriahOfficial

https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. snippet.title: Нови фудбалер у Дианиној школи | Спортисти су популарни у школи
snippet.description:
Спорт постаје популаран у школи, а све девојке желе да њихови момци буду спортисти. Да би постали јаки и храбри, али како се испоставило, нису сви спортисти такви. Диана и њене пријатељице то не воле много, јер сада све девојке имају дечке као спортисте. Кошаркаш слаб? Зашто су се сви момци одлучили да се баве спортом? Погледајте у овом броју!

Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦

hr.title: Novi nogometaš u Dianinoj školi | Sportaši su popularni u školi
hr.description:
Sport postaje popularan u školi, a sve djevojke žele da njihovi dječaci budu sportaši. Da bi postali jaki i hrabri, ali kako se ispostavilo, nisu svi sportaši takvi. Diani i njezinim prijateljima se to ne sviđa previše, jer sada sve djevojke imaju dečke kao sportaše. Jeste li slab košarkaš? Zašto su se svi dečki odlučili baviti sportom? Pogledajte ovo izdanje!
Pretplatite se na kanal! 👩‍👩‍👦‍👦
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1

Hvala na vašim lajkovima! ❤️❤️❤️

Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. I’ve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But it’s wonderful to see that you’re okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesn’t look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess you’re all the same
Because I hear he’s got his arm ‘round a brand new girl
I’ve been picking up my heart
He’s been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But it’s wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It’s the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he’s so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it’s really such a shame
It’s such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I’m Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you’ll miss me
But by then you’ll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery for the last time
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine
You’re perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #587 - Ratko i Zdravko Mamić 1.dio
snippet.description:
Prvi puta izašli smo iz studija, prvi puta snimamo van Hrvatske, prvi puta smo prekoračili 5 i pol sati trajanja. I sve to na Uskrs i sve to u Međugorju, sve pred povijesni četvrtfinalni okršaj Dinama s Villarrealom - gost je tko drugi nego Zdravko Mamić! U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s Modrićem, Šukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopće bivši igrači, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, što kaže za slučaj Majana Dabića, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek početak? Sve to i puno više doznajte u nedjelju od 20 sati samo u Podcast Inkubatoru!
-------------

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 37. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Eda, Selin’in hamilelik haberinden sonra Serkan’dan uzaklaşmaya karar verir. Serkan ise, Eda’nın bu tavrı karşısında şoke olur ama Eda’nın kafa karışıklığına rağmen aşklarına tutunmaya çalışır. Bu sefer Eda için savaşacak olan Serkan’dır. Eda ise, Selin’in gerçekten hamile olup olmadığının peşine düşer. Selin gerçekten hamile mi? Yoksa her şey bir oyun mu? 

Sen Çal Kapımı Ailesine Katılmak için: https://bit.ly/3jB1Rsj﻿
Sen Çal Kapımı Resmi Youtube Kanalı: https://bit.ly/3dxNPVW

Kerem Bürsin ve Hande Erçel’in yanı sıra Neslihan Yeldan, İlayda Çevik, Evrim Doğan, Anıl İlter, Melisa Döngel, Çağrı Çıtanak, Elçin Afacan, Sitare Akbaş, Başak Gümülcinelioğlu, Alican Aytekin, Sarp Bozkurt, İlkyaz Arslan gibi birbirinden başarılı isimleri barındıyor.


#senbenimdünyamsın #KeremBürsin #HandeErçel

snippet.title: Film Theory: Dear DC, I Fixed Your Universe! (Justice League Snyder Cut)
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH    

So now that we've all finally got to see the infamous Snyder Cut of DC's The Justice League, we're good right? Wrong! Now the people want to make it CANON! Well Theorists, what if I told you it already was? What if the original vision of Zack Snyder's Justice League has ALWAYS been canon? That's right! Before you send off that #RestoreTheSnyderVerse tweet, watch this video! It may have you saying #SnyderVerseIsAlreadyCanon instead.

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ► https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH

snippet.title: The coolest phone I've ever broken - Legion Duel Phone 2
snippet.description:
Gaming phones are some of the coolest phones ever. This Legion Duel Phone 2 is definitely one of the coolest. Literally... with its two fans. Its pretty cool. Inside and outside. But is it durable? The Legion duel phone 2 is heavy, but its also oddly shaped... The only way to find out for sure is with a durability test. Remember, durability is not the only factor to consider when picking out your next phone. A good case will solve all structural issues. 

More info on the Legion Duel 2 here: https://www.lenovo.com/gb/en/phones/lenovo/legion-phone-duel/Legion-Phone-Duel-2/p/PPIPPIZ7081

Teardown Video HERE: https://youtu.be/iVixsjxdwCs

Get my razor knife here! https://www.jerryrigknife.com/

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
Aranžman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic​​

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito

snippet.title: Bailey & Asa's PROPOSAL Video ❤️
snippet.description:
Watch as Asa PROPOSES to Bailey after they dated for over four years! He planned this all on his own, with some covert help from Brooklyn, family and friends. Bailey had no idea. What was your favorite part of the proposal? SUBSCRIBE and COMMENT BELOW!

✅ Here is the ring Asa chose for Bailey from James Allen: 👉🏻 https://bit.ly/3gacwM5

✅ Be sure to follow us on Instagram to see MORE PROPOSAL PHOTOS and Stories! 👉🏻 https://www.instagram.com/BrooklynAndBailey

I met Asa met five years ago WAY BACK in 2016 when I was only 16 and he was 15. I didn’t know it then, but I had just met my future husband! It took a year of him pursuing me, and me constantly putting him in the FRIEND ZONE, before I realized what a catch he really was! On Feb 25, 2017, Asa and I officially started dating, ending the day with my very first kiss! You can watch that video, HERE: https://youtu.be/FsI8KtveD3A (y’all prob know that story😉)

In the beginning of this proposal video, there is a small outtake taken when Brooklyn and I were filming our music video for Simple Things in May, 2017. In that moment, Brooklyn and my mom had put Asa up to the task of pranking me with a fake wedding ring and proposal! Little did I know then that four years later Asa would be the one to OFFICIALLY propose to me... and I wouldn't have it ANY. OTHER. WAY! 

As Asa walked me out to where he planned to propose, I started bawling my eyes out when I figured out what was going on... I literally had NO clue! The date 4/3/21 will forever be a day to remember for the both of us.❤️ It might seem small to you, but it was like even the world was counting down for us! 

I’m so glad I got to say YES to my forever! (I’m still having a hard time remembering to call Asa my fiancé instead of boyfriend LOL!)

💋's -Bailey

PS~ Special thanks to Lizzy McAlpine for lending us the use of her unreleased music, to our friend Antoine for taking photos and video, and Kamri for editing this proposal video! And be sure to check back NEXT WEEK for a longer BTS vlog of EVERYTHING leading up to the proposal!
__

💿🎶  Music Track: No Name (unreleased title)
Artist: Lizzy McAlpine
Website: 👉🏻 https://lizzymcalpine.com/

This is an unreleased rendition of Lizzy's beautiful song "Andrew", that was rearranged specifically for this video. This track is as the end of Andrew. You can find all of Lizzy's music, including Andrew, on her website (link above)! 

You should also SUBSCRIBE to Lizzy's YouTube channel, HERE! 👉🏻 https://www.youtube.com/c/LizzyMcAlpine
_

Where else can YOU FIND US???

   📸  Instagram | http://instagram.com/brooklynandbailey
   ⏰  Tik Tok | @BrooklynAndBailey
   🐥  Twitter | http://twitter.com/brookandbailey
   👤  Facebook | http://facebook.com/brooklynandbailey
   👻  SnapChat | http://snapchat.com/add/BrookAndBailey
   🎶  Spotify | https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Y8tcJEqYuIDSNAZEqu9Nd
   ☁️  SoundCloud | http://soundcloud.com/brooklynandbailey
_

Brooklyn & Bailey have run their own YouTube channel since March 2013, but have appeared on YouTube on their mom's CuteGirlsHairstyles channel since early 2008. So, these twins have pretty much grown up with you on YouTube! Both are currently seniors at Baylor University, studying Entrepreneurship and living life to the fullest. If you love all things twins, including lifestyle and advice videos, informative product reviews and hauls, as well as hilarious skits... then be sure to SUBSCRIBE to this channel!
_

FTC Disclaimer: This is not a sponsored video.
_

💥SUPERFANS💥: You can help us translate our uploads, and get credit below each video (and be our fav people ever}! Click here to help: http://www.youtube.com/timedtext_cs_panel?tab=2&c=UC6QWhGQqf0YDYdRb0n6ojWw

Through all the epic moments, one thing remains the same… family always comes first. The Kardashian-Jenner clan continue to overcome it all through their unwavering love and commitment to each other.

snippet.title: ĐOGANI - Lockdown - Official video + Lyrics
snippet.description:
izvršni producent: Đ. ĐOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧 BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- https://www.deezer.com/sr/album/220806082
Spotify  --- https://open.spotify.com/album/1WBQiJwSCkQejkNysoGnfU 
Tidal --- https://store.tidal.com/rs/album/179745531
Amazon --- https://www.amazon.com/Lock-Down-Explicit-Đogani/dp/B091V6715V/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=lockdown+đogani&qid=1618212461&s=dmusic&sr=1-1
ITunes --- https://music.apple.com/us/album/lock-down-single/1561828922
Napster  --- coming soon
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Follow ĐOGANI: 

📲  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
📩 djogani.djole@gmail.com

👉 Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/​ 

👉 Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupa​ 
👉 Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesna​ 

Subscribe to Channel Đogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupaĐOGANIofficial
Uključi 🔔 da dobijaš obaveštenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kući cele noći maskiran
Svetom vlada čudna epidemija
Čekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piše LOCK DOWN,
Vidiš na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci čini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru čekamo
Da me grliš hoću jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Slušaj malo doktore na vestima
Šta će dalje biti baš me zanima
Čekaj, hani, hani, da prođu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Još samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reč
Puničemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beč.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Đole Đogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je što smo sami,
Ne možemo vani
Zato dođi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaš mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
🎵 Antonu
🎵 Marku D.
🎵 Žiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ZABRANJENO je reupload-ovati na svoj lični kanal zbog kršenja autorskih prava i kvarenja zvuka i nepotrebnog gomilanja na YouTube-u! Svako kačenje Video spota na YouTube, biće prijavljeno YouTube administratorima. Sva autorska i izvođačka prava su zaštićena.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: New Mercedes EQS REVIEW & tested 0-60mph - is it as quick as a Tesla?
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

This is the all-new Mercedes EQS!

It’s Mercedes’ answer to the Tesla Model S and Porsche Taycan, and we think it might be one of the best-looking EVs we’ll see all year! 

For starters, it more than looks the part… But then again, would you expect anything else from what's effectively an all-electric S-Class? What’s more, the performance stats are more than good enough. Powered by dual-electric motors, the EQS can deliver 523hp & 835Nm of torque! Not only that, but with an 108kWh battery pack hidden under the surface, it can also apparently provide you with 478 miles of range.

Ok so it may be a bit down compared to the Model S Plaid+, but let's face it, most electric cars will be! However, we think there’s one area where the EQS has the Tesla beat… The interior! Not only will you find high-quality materials throughout the cabin, up-front the dashboard is dominated by the Mercedes Hyperscreen, with a HUGE 18-inch touchscreen down the middle which is flanked by two 12-inch displays! 

Surely the Hyperscreen is enough to convert you to an EV fanboy, right?! There's only one way to find out... Join Mat for this all-new review!

.............................................................

Tiktok - https://www.tiktok.com/@carwow

snippet.title: CHICKEN GIRLS | Season 8 | Ep. 3: “Leo's Return”
snippet.description:
While Leo McCoy’s return to Attaway stirs up plenty of drama; Claire and PK disagree about campaign strategy and Harmony searches for a new extra-curricular.

ABOUT CHICKEN GIRLS
With Rhyme and her friends all grown up, Harmony has found her own squad of Chicken Girls. But with all their new interests, secrets and crushes, can this girl group survive middle school? Created by Janey Feingold.

ABOUT BRAT TV 
Brat TV makes original shows with all of your favorite creators! Tune in every day at 3pm for full episodes of “Chicken Girls,” “Total Eclipse,” “Crown Lake,” “Zoe Valentine” and more.

ABOUT BRAT TV 
Brat TV makes original shows with all of your favorite creators! Tune in every day at 3pm for full episodes of “Chicken Girls,” “Total Eclipse,” “Crown Lake,” “Zoe Valentine” and more.

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow​ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How’s this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We’ve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he’s lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you’ll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it’s not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You’ll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode možete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priče o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priča o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaša čiji postupci se i dan danas prepričavaju. Na čelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih žestokih momaka sa naših prostora, začetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir Magaš, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravičan, patriota pomalo preke naravi rešavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anđeo čuvar dok je za ove druge bio noćna mora, a gnev i jačinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlično pamtili. Životni put Ljubomira Magaša i družine koju je okupio oko sebe, može se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbrižnih dečaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovčega. Saznaćemo na koje sve skrivene i javne načine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih događaja iz njegovog života. Čućemo i svedočanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentarističkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naš sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
Možete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
Možete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#dosije #masanlekic #PRVA

snippet.title: Binging with Babish: Chicken Fingers from Community
snippet.description:
During my weekly re-watching of Community, I was reminded that an entire episode was dedicated to the study group's Goodfellian pursuit of chicken fingers. Needing a break after last week's culinary marathon, I jumped at the opportunity to brine some tendies in pickle juice just to see what happens. Turns out, it tastes real good! Thanks Greendale!

Recipe: https://www.bingingwithbabish.com/recipes/chicken-fingers-community

snippet.title: I Finally Got My Own Show | Dixie D'Amelio

It's all because of you that the Dixie D'Amelio Show evolved into this. We have some awesome episodes and amazing guests this season I cannot wait for you to see! Every Sunday at 10AM PST/1PM EST!!! snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico — go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz — this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful — please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive — https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive — https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. — https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. — https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster — https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. — https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. — https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon — https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. — https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. — https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. — https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. — https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. — https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton — https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“You really find out who’s there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.”
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato’s new song, “Dancing With The Devil”: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID
